what_it_does: Stores metadata for a channel-memory attachment that links attachment id att-3900a86a to the board item item-07fe6c67 in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-07fe6c67
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset
standouts: Empty content beyond the metadata header
conventions: Field naming: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
Target reference uses a URI-style board:// scheme
concerns: No attached payload or explanatory content beyond identifiers
Semantics of board_items and the board:// target are not defined in the file
The referenced board item cannot be resolved from this file alone
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub that records a link between dragnet-development channel memory and board item item-07fe6c67.
questions: What does the board item item-07fe6c67 represent?
What is the intended meaning of attachment_type board_items?
Why is there no body or attached content?
Who added this attachment and for what purpose?
purpose_vs_actual: The file acts as an attachment record (implied by its path, id, and attachment_type), but it contains only linkage metadata with no actual attached content.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to record that a specific board item is attached to the dragnet-development channel memory, likely to support issue or design artifact tracking.
novelty: Uses a board:// URI scheme in the target field rather than a file path or plain identifier.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped association between a channel-memory attachment identifier and a board item, supporting cross-system lookup without embedding the referenced content.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-3900a86a in the dragnet-development channel, of type board_items, targeting board item item-07fe6c67 and created at 2026-06-24T15:14:06Z.
intention_for_embedding: To record that board item item-07fe6c67 is attached to the dragnet-development channel memory as attachment att-3900a86a.
